info.description: Backend API for Memora important days, reminders, notifications, devices, auth, and supporting template endpoints
info.title: Memora API

post.description: Authenticate user and get JWT token
Register or reactivate an Expo push token for the current user

delete.description: Deactivate a registered device token by ID

get.description: List important days for the current user with optional type filtering

post.description: Create an important day and its reminder rules for the current user

get.description: List upcoming occurrences for the current user's important days
Get an important day by ID

put.description: Update an important day by ID

delete.description: Delete an important day by ID

put.description: Replace reminder rules for an important day

get.description: List in-app notifications for the current user

patch.description: Mark all notifications for the current user as read

get.description: List tasks for the current user with optional filtering

post.description: Create a new task for the current user

patch.description: Change task status (todo -> in_progress -> done, or in_progress -> todo)

get.description: Show all translation history for current user
Get reminder defaults and notification preferences for the current user

put.description: Update reminder defaults and notification preferences for the current user
